name: recruiting-copilot
description: Finds a candidate's standout edge, targets fitting roles, tailors their resume, and drafts recruiter outreach.

interface.shortDescription: Land your next role — edge, matches, resume, outreach.
interface.longDescription: Finds a candidate's standout edge, targets fitting roles, tailors their resume, and drafts recruiter outreach. Runs hosted; install to use it from Codex.
